title: Settlement Officer (Bank) (JT)
description:
• To support Business to process the assets transfers externally with counterparties and internally within the Bank.Process different types of transfer covering equities, fixed income, funds and digital assets.
  • Liaise with different parties such as CDP, front office and external third parties for security transfer as well as with front office and custodian to ensure smooth settlement transfer.
  • Ensure all cash and securities breaks are promptly investigated and follow up.
  • Ensure all transfers instructions are processed in accordance the Bank’s operating guidelines and compliance to market requirements.
  • Handle security transfers queries from FO and other stakeholders.
  • Assist in and lead ad-hoc projects on behalf of team.
  • Work with project stakeholders in ensuring timely implementation.
  • Performs other duties that maybe assigned from time to time.
  • Provide support to team leader as and when required

This job advertisement is posted by:

Tan Geok Khim (Deng Yuqin) (R22107857)

A-IT Software Services Pte Ltd

EA License No: 24C2345

“This is in partnership with the Employment and Employability Institute Pte Ltd (“e2i”).

e2i is the empowering network for workers and employers seeking employment and employability solutions. e2i serves as a bridge between workers and employers, connecting with workers to offer job security through job-matching, career guidance and skills upgrading services, and partnering employers to address their manpower needs through recruitment, training, and job redesign solutions.
e2i is a tripartite initiative of the National Trades Union Congress set up to support nation-wide manpower and skills upgrading initiatives. By applying for this role, you consent to A-IT Software Services Pte Ltd’s PDPA and e2i PDPA.

postedCompany.description: A-IT SOFTWARE SERVICES PTE LTD, established in 1991.  Specialized in development outsourcing. Proven track record and continuous strong growth for more than 20 years. Headquartered in Singapore, with the regional office in Malaysia. Expertise in project management, system design & development for consumer banking, credit cards and loans.  Highly proficient in delivering solutions on Vision Plus and Cardpac.
